name: Destructive confirmation (Vue 3)
algorithm: v-model:open drives a native <dialog>; a watch calls showModal()/close(). On open the trigger is saved and focus moves to the safe Cancel button (data-default-focus). showModal() traps focus and inerts the page. Escape/backdrop fire native cancel, routed through a single cancel() path; on close focus is restored to the trigger. An optional confirm-phrase gates the destructive button until the exact phrase is typed.
reduced_motion: Open animation and backdrop fade disabled under prefers-reduced-motion; dialog appears instantly.
responsive_behaviour: min(28rem, 100vw - 2rem) wide; actions right-aligned and wrap if needed; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: Evergreen browsers and Safari 15.4+ for dialog.showModal()/::backdrop; degrades to open attribute.
accessibility: aria-labelledby title; danger button aria-describedby the plain-language consequence; focus defaults to Cancel; Escape cancels; focus restored on close; type-to-confirm gate; 44px targets and visible focus rings.
